steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is speakers of the English language, a plural noun phrase.

steps.title: Apply the subject-verb agreement rule
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb form. Choice A use is the plural present tense form that agrees with the plural subject. Choices B, C, and D are all singular forms and violate the subject-verb agreement rule. This matches choice A — A is correct.
